ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of the sport (e.g., team sport, individual sport) */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin or country of the sport */,
  "popularity_rank" INTEGER /* Popularity rank of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the league belongs to */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of the league (e.g., professional, semi-professional, amateur) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the league's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue the team plays in */,
  "team_type" TEXT /* Type of the team (e.g., professional, amateur) */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the team's official website */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Name of the team's mascot */,
  "primary_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team's uniform */,
  "secondary_color" TEXT /* Secondary color of the team's uniform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of the venue (e.g., stadium, arena, field) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available at the venue */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was built */,
  "last_renovated_year" INTEGER /* Last year the venue was renovated */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the venue's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team-performance" (
  "team_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the metric belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "standings" TEXT /* Current standings for the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season or year the performance metrics apply to */,
  "total_games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of games that ended in a draw */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total number of goals conceded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league-administrators" (
  "league_administrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the administrator belongs to */,
  "administrator_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the administrator within the league */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the administrator joined the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_administrator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team-owners" (
  "team_owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the owner belongs to */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the owner joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue-managers" (
  "venue_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue the manager belongs to */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the manager joined the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., league administrator, team owner, venue manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
